title: Pilot authority named
evidence: Written approval naming who can start pause and close the private pilot
stop_condition: Pilot proceeds on informal interest only

title: Privacy notice approved
evidence: Plain-language notice covers purpose fields retention access deletion and official handoff
stop_condition: People submit private fields without a reviewed privacy notice

title: Minimum field list locked
evidence: Only fields required for the private test are listed and justified
stop_condition: Nice-to-have fields are collected because they might be useful later

title: Toastmasters pathway separate
evidence: Official applications signatures member numbers fees and charter roster stay in official workflow
stop_condition: Governance Commons stores official Toastmasters paperwork

title: Access needs private support path
evidence: Access needs go to named support role only and are not exported publicly
stop_condition: Access needs appear in screenshots issue trackers or public CSV/JSON

title: Private environment separated
evidence: Private pilot has separate auth backups logs admin list and no public indexing
stop_condition: Private data is placed in the static public package

title: Role/access matrix approved
evidence: Every role has allowed access exclusions and removal route
stop_condition: Organisation supporters receive member-level or admin access by default

title: Consent and withdrawal path tested
evidence: Participant can ask what is stored change track withdraw or request deletion
stop_condition: Withdrawal requires manual guesswork or is not recorded

title: Incident response route ready
evidence: Named contact 24-hour triage containment notification and cleanup steps
stop_condition: Data exposure has no owner or response clock

title: Cultural and conduct escalation path
evidence: Questions complaints inappropriate content and unsafe behaviour have a named path
stop_condition: Sensitive issues are handled by public comments or ad hoc messages

title: Evidence pack excludes private data
evidence: Screenshots and reports use redacted/fake records only

title: Private Decidim mapping approved
evidence: Components permissions registration settings exports and admins are documented
stop_condition: Public sample mapping is copied into private pilot without permission review

title: Closeout and deletion rule ready
evidence: Pilot end date retention period export owner deletion owner and archived evidence rules
stop_condition: Pilot records remain indefinitely without approval

title: Go/no-go decision meeting scheduled
evidence: Decision agenda uses gates scenarios incidents data map and open risks
stop_condition: Pilot advances because the demo looks polished
